variants.title: Filtrec RHR210M10V3/AB1 Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHR210M10V
variants.option1Value: Filtrec RHR210M10V3/AB1 Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHR210M10V
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec RHR210M10V3/AB1. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the RHR210M10V3/AB1 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Media: Synthetic, Efficiency 1: 13µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 15µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 88.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 40.1 mm, Length: 277.0 mm, Bypass Pressure: 3.0 BAR bar, Δ Collapse Pressure: 20 bar, Seal Material: Viton, Temperature Range: -25 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 13µ @ β200, Media Type: Synthetic, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 3.0 BAR, Collapse Pressure: 20 BAR, Seal: Viton
